name: xray-test-suite-skills
description: Single-plugin marketplace hosting the xray-test-suite plugin: a Claude Code workflow for generating Xray test cases from requirements and importing them via CSV or Atlassian API.

plugins.name: xray-test-suite
plugins.description: Generate Xray test cases end-to-end: parse requirements, present test matrix, deliver as CSV import file, direct Jira API creation, or both. Includes the /xray-tests slash command.
